# GigWiseTax

> Free tax calculators for gig workers and self-employed — DoorDash, Uber, Instacart, Amazon Flex, Airbnb, OnlyFans, and 40+ other platforms. All 50 states, no signup required.

## What this site does

GigWiseTax helps 1099 independent contractors estimate their self-employment taxes, quarterly payments, and deductions. Calculators are free, instant, and cover all US states.

## Key pages

- /doordash — DoorDash tax calculator 2026
- /uber — Uber driver tax calculator 2026
- /instacart — Instacart shopper tax calculator 2026
- /amazon-flex — Amazon Flex tax calculator 2026
- /airbnb — Airbnb host tax calculator 2026
- /walmart-spark — Walmart Spark driver tax calculator 2026
- /grubhub — Grubhub driver tax calculator 2026
- /1099-tax-calculator — General 1099 self-employment tax calculator
- /blog/doordash-taxes-2026 — DoorDash taxes guide 2026
- /blog/instacart-shopper-taxes-2026 — Instacart taxes guide 2026
- /blog/onlyfans-tax-guide-2026 — OnlyFans taxes guide 2026

## Who this is for

Gig economy workers in the US who need to estimate: self-employment tax (15.3%), federal income tax, state income tax, quarterly estimated payments, and deductible business expenses (mileage at 72.5¢/mi, phone, equipment).
